channel.title: Portable Office Cabin — Product Feed
channel.description: Portable cabins, container offices, site offices, security cabins and shipping containers manufactured by Portable Office Cabin. All prices are in INR and inclusive of 18% GST.

item.g:title: Executive Portable Cabin 20ft x 10ft PUF Insulated for Site Offices | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: Built this one for clients who need a proper office feel, not just a tin box on site. We've used 50mm PUF panels that actually keep the heat out during summer — tried and tested across Karnataka's construction sites. The interiors are clean, the wiring is sorted, and you can move it whenever your project shifts. Most of our clients use these for site offices or temporary meeting spaces.
item.g:product_highlight: Dimensions: 20ft x 10ft x 9.5ft
Floor Area: 200 sq ft
Wall Panels: 50mm PUF Insulated
Flooring: 18mm Marine Plywood
Electrical: Complete wiring with MCB
Windows: Sliding aluminum with grill

item.g:title: MS Portable Cabin 1.5-2mm Mild Steel Insulated for Site Offices | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: Complete guide to MS portable cabins in India covering mild steel construction, standard sizes, price ranges, applications, customization options, and installation guidance for 2024–2025 buyers.
item.g:product_highlight: Popular Sizes: 8x20 ft, 10x20 ft, 10x30 ft, 40x10 ft
Frame Material: MS C-channel 75x40 mm or RHS 50x50x3 mm
Wall Panels: 1.5–2 mm MS sheet with 30–50 mm insulation
Roofing: Sloping MS roof with insulation and EPDM waterproofing
Flooring: 18 mm cement board with 2 mm vinyl finish
Windows: Aluminium sliding windows with tinted glass

g:product_detail.g:attribute_value: MS C-channel 75x40 mm or RHS 50x50x3 mm
1.5–2 mm MS sheet with 30–50 mm insulation
Sloping MS roof with insulation and EPDM waterproofing
18 mm cement board with 2 mm vinyl finish
Aluminium sliding windows with tinted glass
6–10 points per 200 sq ft with MCB and LED lights
Epoxy zinc phosphate primer with PU top coat
Office, security, labour accommodation, toilet, classroom

item.g:title: Storage Container 20ft & 40ft Corten Steel for Secure Site Storage | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: Heavy-duty cargo storage and shipping containers built to handle the toughest storage demands. Available in standard 20ft and 40ft sizes with Corten steel construction for maximum weather resistance. Ideal for secure on-site material storage, warehousing, and logistics. These containers feature reinforced flooring, lockable cargo doors, and anti-corrosion treatment — ready to deploy at construction sites, factories, ports, and commercial facilities across India.
item.g:product_highlight: Sizes Available: 20ft x 8ft x 8.5ft / 40ft x 8ft x 8.5ft
Floor Area: 160 sq ft / 320 sq ft
Frame: Corten steel (weathering steel)
Flooring: 28mm marine-grade plywood
Doors: Double-leaf lockable cargo doors
Roof: Corrugated steel, watertight sealed

item.g:title: Prefabricated Portable Cabin Galvanized MS Frame for Site Offices | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: High-quality prefabricated portable cabins designed for rapid deployment and long-term durability. These factory-built modular structures feature mild steel frame construction with insulated wall panels, offering versatile solutions for site office, accommodation units, security cabins, and storage units. Built with precision engineering and weather resistance materials for reliable performance across construction sites, industrial facilities, and commercial buildings.
item.g:product_highlight: Frame: Hot-dip galvanized MS steel framework
Wall Panels: PUF insulated sandwich panels
Sizes Available: 8x10 sq ft to 40x12 ft (L x W)
Insulation: PUF core with vapor barrier protection
Flooring: Marine plywood with vinyl/laminate finish
Doors: Powder-coated steel or flush doors

g:product_detail.g:attribute_value: 8x10 sq ft to 40x12 ft (L x W)
PUF core with vapor barrier protection

item.g:title: Shipping Container 20ft & 40ft ISO Steel for Storage & Office Conversion | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: Shipping containers for sale in India for storage, site offices, and modular buildings. Available in 20 ft, 40 ft, and high cube options with delivery, installation, and custom conversion support.
item.g:product_highlight: Formats: 20 ft GP / 40 ft GP / 40 ft high cube
Primary Use: Storage, site office, modular building, cargo support
Structure: ISO-grade corrugated steel container shell
Coverage: Pan-India supply, delivery, and installation support
Condition Options: Used storage grade / wind-and-water tight / one-trip / converted
Customization: Doors, windows, insulation, electrical, plumbing, interior fit-out

g:product_detail.g:attribute_value: 20 ft GP / 40 ft GP / 40 ft high cube
Storage, site office, modular building, cargo support
Pan-India supply, delivery, and installation support
Used storage grade / wind-and-water tight / one-trip / converted
Doors, windows, insulation, electrical, plumbing, interior fit-out
New and certified used 20 ft units — this listing is priced above
Storage, offices, homes, cafés, accommodation, security cabins

item.g:title: Cargo Container 20ft & 40ft Steel for Storage & Modular Conversion | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: Cargo containers for sale in India for storage, transport, rentals, and modular conversions. Available in 10 ft, 20 ft GP, 30 ft custom, 40 ft GP, 40 ft HC, and reefer formats with pan-India supply.
item.g:product_highlight: Popular Sizes: 10 ft fabricated / 20 ft GP / 30 ft custom / 40 ft GP / 40 ft HC
Condition Grades: One-trip / Cargo-Worthy / Wind & Water Tight / As-Is
Construction: Corten steel shell with marine plywood or chequered steel flooring
Applications: Storage, transport, office conversion, homes, cafés, labour accommodation
Supply Model: Sale, rental, lease, and turnkey conversion
Coverage: Pan-India delivery from major ports and inland depots

g:product_detail.g:attribute_value: 10 ft fabricated / 20 ft GP / 30 ft custom / 40 ft GP / 40 ft HC
One-trip / Cargo-Worthy / Wind & Water Tight / As-Is
Corten steel shell with marine plywood or chequered steel flooring
Storage, transport, office conversion, homes, cafés, labour accommodation
Sale, rental, lease, and turnkey conversion
Pan-India delivery from major ports and inland depots
Cargo-worthy used 20 ft containers — this listing is priced above

item.g:title: Office Portable Cabin Insulated Mild Steel Frame for Site Offices | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: Fast, flexible office portable cabin built for Indian project sites, factories, campuses, and field operations with insulated panels, office-ready electricals, and easy relocation.
item.g:product_highlight: Popular Sizes: 10x8 ft, 20x8 ft, 20x10 ft, 30x10 ft, 40x10 ft
Frame: IS-standard mild steel frame with welded joints
Panels: 40–50 mm PUF or EPS insulated sandwich panels
Flooring: 18 mm marine plywood with vinyl or cement board finish
Windows: uPVC or aluminium sliding windows
Electrical: Concealed wiring, MCB box, LED lights, 5A/15A sockets, AC point

g:product_detail.g:attribute_value: IS-standard mild steel frame with welded joints
40–50 mm PUF or EPS insulated sandwich panels
18 mm marine plywood with vinyl or cement board finish
Concealed wiring, MCB box, LED lights, 5A/15A sockets, AC point
Typically 8–24 hours for single cabin placement

item.g:title: Prefab Labour Hutment IS 800 Steel for Worker & Staff Accommodation | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: Modular, factory-built labour hutments and staff accommodation for rapid deployment at construction sites, industrial plants, and infrastructure projects. Insulated sandwich panels, IS 800 compliant steel frames, and plug-and-play MEP fittings. G+1/G+2 configurations available.
item.g:product_highlight: Structure: IS 800 compliant modular steel frame, 3–5mm sections
Panels: 40–60mm PUF/EPS insulated sandwich panels (0.4–0.5mm PPGI)
Thermal Range: -5°C to 50°C ambient
Configurations: G, G+1, G+2 dormitory and staff blocks
Capacity: 8–24 persons per module (bunk bed layout)
Installation: Factory prep 2–4 weeks + site install 7–21 days

g:product_detail.g:attribute_value: IS 800 compliant modular steel frame, 3–5mm sections
G, G+1, G+2 dormitory and staff blocks
Factory prep 2–4 weeks + site install 7–21 days

item.g:title: Prefab Porta Cabin ISMC Steel Frame Insulated for Site Offices | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: Complete prefab porta cabin solutions for India — factory-fabricated modular buildings with MS steel frameworks and insulated sandwich panels. Available in sizes from 80 sq ft security cabins to 800 sq ft offices and G+1 labour colonies.
item.g:product_highlight: Frame: MS structural sections (ISMC/ISMB), 4mm thickness with epoxy/anti-rust coating
Panels: 50–75mm PUF/EPS/Rockwool sandwich panels, fire-rated options available
Sizes: 8x10 ft to 20x40 ft (80–800 sq ft), custom sizes available
Flooring: 18mm cement board or marine plywood with vinyl/tile finish
Wind Load: Designed per IS 875 (150–200 km/h for coastal areas)
Installation: Hours to 2 days on simple PCC block foundation

g:product_detail.g:attribute_value: MS structural sections (ISMC/ISMB), 4mm thickness with epoxy/anti-rust coating
50–75mm PUF/EPS/Rockwool sandwich panels, fire-rated options available
8x10 ft to 20x40 ft (80–800 sq ft), custom sizes available
18mm cement board or marine plywood with vinyl/tile finish
Designed per IS 875 (150–200 km/h for coastal areas)
Hours to 2 days on simple PCC block foundation

item.g:title: Labour Hutment Galvanized Steel Insulated for Worker Accommodation | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: Prefabricated labor hutments for construction sites, infrastructure projects, and industrial locations. PUF/EPS insulated panels, galvanized steel frames, move-in ready with electrical and sanitary fixtures. G+1/G+2 configurations for 50–1,000+ workers.
item.g:product_highlight: Structure: Galvanized steel frames, wind resistance up to 150 km/h, seismic zones III–IV
Panels: 30–60mm PUF/EPS insulated sandwich panels
Worker Density: 6–12 workers per room with bunk beds
Configurations: Single-story, G+1, G+2 with staircases and corridors
Capacity: 50–1,000+ workers per colony
Installation: 5–15 days for small colonies; 3–4 weeks for 200–300 workers

g:product_detail.g:attribute_value: Galvanized steel frames, wind resistance up to 150 km/h, seismic zones III–IV
6–12 workers per room with bunk beds
Single-story, G+1, G+2 with staircases and corridors
5–15 days for small colonies; 3–4 weeks for 200–300 workers
1–3 years temporary, up to 15–20 years semi-permanent

item.g:title: Portable Cabin PUF Sandwich Panel 50-75mm for Site Offices | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: Complete cabin portable solutions including site offices, worker accommodation, security cabins, portable toilets, and container conversions. MS, GI, FRP, and sandwich panel construction with 10-25 year lifespan.
item.g:product_highlight: Structure Types: MS Framed, GI Modular, Container Conversion, Sandwich Panel
Standard Sizes: 4x4 ft to 40x8 ft; G+1 stacked configurations
Frame Material: Mild Steel / Galvanized Iron / CORTEN Steel
Wall Panels: PUF/EPS/Rockwool Sandwich Panels (50-75mm)
Flooring: Vinyl, Laminated, Chequered Plate, Marine Plywood
Insulation: PUF/EPS/Rockwool – R-values up to 30

g:product_detail.g:attribute_value: MS Framed, GI Modular, Container Conversion, Sandwich Panel
4x4 ft to 40x8 ft; G+1 stacked configurations
Mild Steel / Galvanized Iron / CORTEN Steel
Vinyl, Laminated, Chequered Plate, Marine Plywood
Pre-wired with MCBs, LED lighting, split AC provision

item.g:title: Modular Office Cabin with Glass Partitions for Indoor Workspaces | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: Modern modular office cabins for 2026 — glass-and-steel prefabricated workspaces including manager cabins, team pods, phone booths, meeting rooms, and executive suites. 30–40 dB acoustic performance with double-glazed glass. Install 4–6 cabins over a weekend with minimal disruption.
item.g:product_highlight: Frame Material: Powder-coated aluminium or steel
Glass Options: Clear, frosted, tinted — single or double-glazed
Acoustic Rating: 30–40 dB sound reduction
Insulation: PUF/EPS/Gypsum modular panels
Lighting: LED with motion sensors, 3000K warm tone
Size Range: 1 m² phone booth to 18+ m² executive cabin

g:product_detail.g:attribute_value: Clear, frosted, tinted — single or double-glazed
LED with motion sensors, 3000K warm tone
1 m² phone booth to 18+ m² executive cabin
4–6 cabins in 1 weekend; 20-cabin cluster in 2–3 weeks

item.g:title: Steel Office Container 10ft to 40ft Stackable for Site Offices | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: Steel portable office container built from ISMC/RHS structural steel framing with 1.2–1.6 mm MS or GI cladding. Available in 10 ft, 20 ft, 30 ft, and 40 ft lengths. Factory-fitted electricals, PUF/EPS/rock wool insulation (40–60 mm), and modular furniture. Deploys in 7–15 days with 1–2 day onsite placement. Reusable for 8–10 project cycles with 10–25 year service life.
item.g:product_highlight: Frame Material: ISMC / RHS structural steel
Cladding: MS or galvanized steel sheets, 1.2–1.6 mm thickness
Wall Insulation: PUF, EPS, glass wool, or rock wool — 40–60 mm
Floor: Steel frame base with marine plywood/cement board + vinyl/PVC flooring
Roof: Insulated panels with slope for rainwater drainage
Sizes Available: 10 ft, 20 ft, 30 ft, 40 ft lengths; 8.5–9.5 ft height

g:product_detail.g:attribute_value: MS or galvanized steel sheets, 1.2–1.6 mm thickness
PUF, EPS, glass wool, or rock wool — 40–60 mm
Steel frame base with marine plywood/cement board + vinyl/PVC flooring
Insulated panels with slope for rainwater drainage
10 ft, 20 ft, 30 ft, 40 ft lengths; 8.5–9.5 ft height
Factory-fitted copper wiring, MCB panel, 6–12 LEDs, 15A sockets

item.g:title: Pink Cargo Storage Container 20ft x 8ft Used Shipping Container for Retail Kiosks & Cafes | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: Pink cargo storage containers — ISO shipping containers finished in vibrant pink shades for branding, retail pop-ups, cafés, offices, and modular buildings. Available in 20ft and 40ft sizes with full customisation.
item.g:product_highlight: Sizes Available: 20ft x 8ft (this listing); 10ft / 40ft on quotation
Material: Corten Steel or Mild Steel (IS 2062)
Paint System: Epoxy primer 80μm + PU topcoat 60μm, 5000hr salt spray
Colour Options: RAL 3015 Light Pink, Pantone Hot Pink, Custom Brand Match
Floor Load: 250–500 kg/sqm
20ft Volume: ~33 cubic metres

g:product_detail.g:attribute_value: Epoxy primer 80μm + PU topcoat 60μm, 5000hr salt spray
RAL 3015 Light Pink, Pantone Hot Pink, Custom Brand Match

item.g:title: Standard Site Office Container 20ft x 8ft Corten Steel for Construction Sites | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: We build these from modified shipping containers — the same ones that survive ocean journeys. Tough as nails, perfect for construction sites where things get rough. Comes with proper insulation so your team isn't roasting inside. We've delivered hundreds of these across Bangalore and surrounding areas.
item.g:product_highlight: Dimensions: 20ft x 8ft x 8.5ft
Floor Area: 160 sq ft
Frame: Corten Steel
Insulation: Rockwool 50mm
Door: Steel security door
Windows: 2x reinforced glass

item.g:title: Portable Cabin 40ft Bunkhouse with Bathroom for Worker Accommodation | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: When you have a team staying on site, they need proper rest. This 40ft bunkhouse sleeps 8-12 people with actual beds, not just floor mats. Attached bathroom with shower, small pantry area for making chai. We've set these up at remote project sites and mining locations.
item.g:product_highlight: Dimensions: 40ft x 10ft x 9.5ft
Capacity: 8-12 persons
Bunks: 6 double bunks
Bathroom: Attached with shower
Kitchen: Pantry area
AC: 2 x 1.5 ton split

item.g:title: Modern Container Office 40ft x 8ft Insulated for Workspaces | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: This isn't your typical container — we've fitted it out like a proper modern office. Glass facade option, split AC already installed, acoustic panels so you can actually take calls without shouting. Popular with startups who want something different without the permanent construction hassle.
item.g:product_highlight: Dimensions: 40ft x 8ft x 9.5ft
Floor Area: 320 sq ft
Ceiling: Acoustic panels
Flooring: Vinyl wood finish
HVAC: Split AC included
Lighting: LED panel lights

item.g:title: Portable Toilet Block 20ft 4-Unit for Construction Sites & Events | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: Let's be honest — site toilets are usually terrible. We built these to be different. Proper ceramic fittings, exhaust fans that work, easy to clean surfaces. Four units with separate sections. Used at construction sites, outdoor events, even some factories.
item.g:product_highlight: Dimensions: 20ft x 8ft x 8ft
Units: 4 toilets
Water Tank: 500L overhead
Septic Tank: 1000L
Fittings: Ceramic sanitaryware
Ventilation: Exhaust fans

item.g:title: Guard Security Cabin 20ft x 10ft with 360 Degree Visibility for Gate Posts | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: Compact cabin for your security guard — windows on all four sides so they can see everything. Built-in desk for the register, storage underneath for their stuff. We've installed these at factories, apartment complexes, and parking lots across the city.
item.g:product_highlight: Dimensions: 20ft x 10ft x 8ft
Windows: 4-side sliding glass
Desk: Built-in workstation
Lighting: LED tube lights
Electrical: 15A socket points
Roof: Insulated with slope

item.g:title: Porta Cabin 40ft x 12ft BIS Certified MS Steel for Offices & Accommodation | Portable Office Cabin
item.g:description: A porta cabin is a steel-framed, insulated, factory-manufactured modular structure designed for quick assembly, easy transportation, and reuse across multiple sites. Available for site offices, accommodation, security, sanitation, and commercial applications across India.
item.g:product_highlight: Dimensions: L 40ft x W 12ft x H 9ft
Frame: BIS-certified MS steel (ISMC, RHS, SHS)
Wall Panels: 40–50mm PUF/EPS/Rockwool sandwich panels
Roofing: Sloped PPGI sheets or insulated panels
Flooring: 16–19mm marine plywood with vinyl/laminate
Doors: Powder-coated steel or flush doors

g:product_detail.g:attribute_value: Sloped PPGI sheets or insulated panels
Aluminium or uPVC with MS grills
MCB-protected circuits, LED lights, AC provision
